headline: Why CoStar Group (CSGP) Is Up 8.4% After New Buyback And Mixed Q4 2025 Results - And What's Next
summary: CoStar Group reported past fourth-quarter 2025 results with sales rising to US$900 million from US$709 million, while net income fell to US$47 million from US$60 million and diluted EPS from continuing operations decreased to US$0.11 from US$0.15. At the same time, insider share purchases, activist pressure on the residential push, a new US$1.50 billion buyback, and AI-related concerns about its data platforms are pulling investors’ attention toward the balance between growth investments and...
